events.name: Mariano's 30th Birthday & Chicago Trip
events.context: Mariano turns 30 on March 19th. Plan includes a 1-2 night warm-weather backpacking trip (Mar 14-15), then flights to Chicago for the birthday celebration.
events.hook: Book backpacking destination flights and arrange REI gear rentals before the trip. Decide on Mariano's gift.

actions.name: Find warm backpacking destination (1-2 night, mid-March)
Book flight from backpacking to Chicago
Figure out REI gear rentals (backpack, tent, sleeping bag)

events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana through Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Currently in activity planning phase and planning to buy 4 pairs of eyeglasses in Japan.
events.hook: Validate eyeglasses insurance and prescription requirements. Look up stores in Kyoto. Plan activities in Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
